findings.title: Secret evidence contains provider-token-shaped strings and the scan scope misses them
findings.description: The archived red evidence contains a concrete provider-token-shaped literal, and the green secret scan explicitly excludes the source test that embeds similar literals while not scanning evidence logs. This violates the ticket rule that no raw provider key or key-shaped string appears in source, logs, or artifacts, so the bundle cannot be approved until these fixtures/evidence are redacted or generated without persisting token-shaped values and the scan covers the durable bundle.
